stat.title: Pitcher Hit Parade
stat.subtitle: Hits by pitchers (yes, really).
stat.formula: Hits by a pitcher batting (roster ID or play description starting with “Pitcher …”)

notableEvents.label: Shohei Ohtani — pitcher hit
notableEvents.detail: Shohei Ohtani singles on a ground ball to center fielder Byron Buxton. Alex Freeland scores.

notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas — pitcher hit
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas doubles (10) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Austin Martin. Jorge Barrosa scores. Tommy Troy scores. Geraldo Perdomo scores.
